semantic.role: Validation script for ensuring the integrity of ArchSpine schema definitions and example files.
responsibilities: Loading and registering JSON schemas from the schemas directory.
Validating example JSON files against their corresponding schemas.
Handling special validation for Markdown rule documents with frontmatter.
Reporting validation success or failure with detailed error messages.
outOfScope: Creating or managing protocol instance data.
Documenting the ArchSpine system architecture beyond validation.

English.purpose: This document provides the automated validation logic that ensures all ArchSpine protocol assets — schemas, examples, and rule documents — conform to their defined contracts. It is the quality gate for maintaining structural consistency across the mirror system.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine protocol who need to verify that new or modified schema examples remain valid. The script is run as part of CI or development workflow.
key_takeaways: Validates five types of example files against their respective schemas.
Uses AJV for strict JSON Schema 2020-12 validation with formats.
Handles both pure JSON examples and Markdown files with YAML frontmatter.
Exits with non-zero code on any validation failure, suitable for automated pipelines.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了自动化验证逻辑，确保所有 ArchSpine 协议资产——包括模式定义、示例文件和规则文档——符合其既定契约。它是维护镜像系统结构一致性的质量关卡。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向 ArchSpine 协议的开发者和维护者，他们需要验证新增或修改的模式示例是否仍然有效。该脚本作为持续集成或开发工作流的一部分运行。
key_takeaways: 验证五种示例文件分别对应的模式。
使用 AJV 进行严格的 JSON Schema 2020-12 格式验证。
同时处理纯 JSON 示例文件和带有 YAML 前置元数据的 Markdown 文件。
任何验证失败都会以非零退出码结束，适合自动化流程。
